name: Josh Johnson
bio: Josh Johnson is an American stand-up comedian and writer from Alexandria, Louisiana, known for thoughtful topical material and for releasing new stand-up sets on YouTube nearly every week. He has written for and appeared on The Daily Show, joining its rotation of hosts in 2025.

timeline.ev: Becomes a writer for The Daily Show
Named New York's Funniest Stand Up
Begins weekly topical stand-up uploads on YouTube
Joins The Daily Show rotation of hosts

bits.t: Jada and Will and YOU! + what does viral mean?
Escaped Convict Caught! - Misplaced Male Confidence
Viral 1st Dates List & Halloween In NYC
